description: Identifies unused static files in module files/ directories via static analysis. Discovers all files under modules/<mod>/files/ and checks whether their canonical puppet:///modules/<mod>/<path> URI appears in any manifest, function, ERB template, or Ruby library file in the environment. No Puppet Server or PuppetDB connection is required. Note: files inside directories served with `recurse => true` via a directory URI may appear unused even if deployed — review results in modules that use recursive file serving.

environment.description: Puppet environment to analyse. Defaults to 'production'.

env_dir.description: Absolute path to the environment directory on the Primary Server. Defaults to the path derived from `puppet config print environmentpath` and the environment parameter (e.g. /etc/puppetlabs/code/environments/production).
